title: Miner's Luck
description: Probability of obtaining extra resources when mining stone
body:
What is it about?

This mod is very simple. When mining stone, deepslate, andesite, diorite, granite, or tuff, you may obtain some extra resources such as iron nuggets, gold nuggets, copper, amethyst, coal, and diamond. You will also get extra resources when mining netherrack, basalt, and blackstone. They will drop gold nuggets, quartz, and netherite scrap.

Required mods

Architectury api and RestApi
